name: hxrizxn-ai
description: Hxrizxn AI - HORIZON-X multi-agent decision simulator.

scripts.install:all: npm install --workspaces && python -m pip install -e apps/api[dev]
scripts.test: npm run test:web && npm run test:api
scripts.docker:build: docker build -t hxrizxn-api:local apps/api && docker build -t hxrizxn-web:local apps/web
